title: My Quarto Website
text:
Richa Gandhi







I excel in translating complex research and analytics into actionable insights that support evidence based decision making. Through these experiences, I’ve built expertise at the intersection of data, policy, and strategy, helping organizations streamline processes, solve problems, and deliver impact. My professional and academic background fuels my passion for strategic decision making and data driven problem solving.
